title: Good: Idempotent init with double-init guard
description: lora_l2.c:lichen_lora_l2_init() checks initialized flag under mutex before generating EUI-64. Comment explicitly notes TOCTOU prevention. This prevents multiple EUI-64 values if both main.c and NET_DEVICE_INIT call init().
close_reason: Positive review observation recorded; no implementation action required.
